metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4029
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4: DCV fusion analysis using NPY-pHluorin in single control or RIM cDKO hippocampal neurons without or with the expression of full-length RIM1α (grey), MUNC13-2 WT (purple).
Figure 4B-E and Figure S7A-D: Overexpression of MUNC13-2 (WT) restores DCV fusion in hippocampal neurons.

20/01/2021 Dnyanada: The current paper demonstrates a complete abrogation of DCV fusion in RIM cDKO mice which is rescued by overexpression of MUNC13-2. The term "regulation.." was chosen based on the relatively partial rescue seen in overexpressed MUNC13-2 neurons as compared to the overexpression in RIM1 neurons.. Experimental description: The MUNC13-2(WT) rescue construct was derived as described in Deng et al., 2011. Upon looking into Deng et al, 2011, the GFP-tagged rat ubMunc13-2 lentivirus was cited to be derived from Rosenmund et al., 2002.
